ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "amount" REAL /* Loan amount */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "payments" REAL /* Monthly payment amount */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the loan (e.g., -1 for default, 1 for active) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of payments (e.g., 0 for monthly, 1 for bi-weekly) */,
  "num_clients" INTEGER /* Number of clients associated with the loan */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the client (0 for male, 1 for female) */,
  "has_card" INTEGER /* Whether the client has a credit card (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "num_salaries" INTEGER /* Number of salaries credited to the account */,
  "average_balance_fluctuation_per_month" REAL /* Average balance fluctuation per month */,
  "recent_balance" REAL /* Recent balance in the account */,
  "num_household_payments" INTEGER /* Number of household payments made */,
  "num_payments_for_statement" INTEGER /* Number of payments for the statement */,
  "num_insurance_payments" INTEGER /* Number of insurance payments made */,
  "num_sanction_payments" INTEGER /* Number of sanction payments made */,
  "num_interests_credited" INTEGER /* Number of interests credited */,
  "num_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions */,
  "ratio_credits" REAL /* Ratio of credits to total transactions */,
  "ratio_withdrawals" REAL /* Ratio of withdrawals to total transactions */,
  "avg_balance" REAL /* Average balance in the account */,
  "min_balance" REAL /* Minimum balance in the account */,
  "max_balance" REAL /* Maximum balance in the account */,
  "avg_credit" REAL /* Average credit amount */,
  "avg_withdrawal" REAL /* Average withdrawal amount */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the client */,
  "age_when_loan" INTEGER /* Age of the client when the loan was taken */,
  "account_age_when_loan" REAL /* Age of the account when the loan was taken */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan application was submitted */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was approved */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan amount was disbursed */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Annual interest rate of the loan */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of collateral (e.g., property, vehicle) provided for the loan */,
  "collateral_value" REAL /* Value of the collateral */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the client at the time of application */,
  "risk_assessment" REAL /* Risk assessment score generated by the institution's risk model */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch that processed the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan taken by the client */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the client (0 for male, 1 for female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the client */,
  "has_card" INTEGER /* Whether the client has a credit card (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "num_salaries" INTEGER /* Number of salaries credited to the account */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Client's residential address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Client's contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Client's email address */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, self-employed, unemployed) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Client's occupation */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  "income_sources" TEXT /* Additional income sources (e.g., rental income, investments) */,
  "credit_history" TEXT /* Summary of the client's credit history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "code" INTEGER /* Code of the region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "munip_499" INTEGER /* Number of municipalities with less than 499 inhabitants */,
  "munip_500_1999" INTEGER /* Number of municipalities with 500-1999 inhabitants */,
  "munip_2000_9999" INTEGER /* Number of municipalities with 2000-9999 inhabitants */,
  "munip_10000" INTEGER /* Number of municipalities with more than 10000 inhabitants */,
  "cities" INTEGER /* Number of cities in the region */,
  "urbanization" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the region */,
  "avg_salary" REAL /* Average salary in the region */,
  "unemployment_96" REAL /* Unemployment rate in 1996 */,
  "entrepreneurs_1000" REAL /* Entrepreneurs per 1000 inhabitants */,
  "crimerate_96" REAL /* Crime rate in 1996 */,
  "crimegrowth" REAL /* Crime growth rate */,
  "unempgrowth" REAL /* Unemployment growth rate */,
  "latest_population" REAL /* Latest population data (e.g., from the most recent census) */,
  "latest_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Latest unemployment rate */,
  "latest_crime_rate" REAL /* Latest crime rate */,
  "latest_avg_salary" REAL /* Latest average salary */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate over the past few years */,
  "economic_growth_rate" REAL /* Economic growth rate over the past few years */,
  "housing_market_index" REAL /* Index reflecting the state of the housing market */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "code" INTEGER /* Code of the branch */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the branch is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the branch area */,
  "munip_499" INTEGER /* Number of municipalities with less than 499 inhabitants */,
  "munip_500_1999" INTEGER /* Number of municipalities with 500-1999 inhabitants */,
  "munip_2000_9999" INTEGER /* Number of municipalities with 2000-9999 inhabitants */,
  "munip_10000" INTEGER /* Number of municipalities with more than 10000 inhabitants */,
  "cities" INTEGER /* Number of cities in the branch area */,
  "urbanization" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the branch area */,
  "avg_salary" REAL /* Average salary in the branch area */,
  "unemployment_96" REAL /* Unemployment rate in 1996 */,
  "entrepreneurs_1000" REAL /* Entrepreneurs per 1000 inhabitants */,
  "crimerate_96" REAL /* Crime rate in 1996 */,
  "crimegrowth" REAL /* Crime growth rate */,
  "unempgrowth" REAL /* Unemployment growth rate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the branch */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the branch */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the branch */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch manager */,
  "manager_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the branch manager */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees working at the branch */,
  "loan_approval_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the branch approves loan applications */,
  "client_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Client satisfaction score based on surveys */,
  "service_quality_score" REAL /* Service quality score based on internal audits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure storage */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Time when the account is locked out due to multiple failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the loan */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
